name: LGI Homes, Inc.
business: LGI Homes designs, constructs, and sells new homes, primarily targeting entry-level homebuyers, with additional luxury, active adult, and wholesale offerings. The company operates in 36 markets across 21 states and had 144 active communities as of December 31, 2025.

exposures.sentence: We are engaged in the design, construction and sale of new homes in markets in Texas, Arizona, Florida, Georgia, New Mexico, Colorado, North Carolina, South Carolina, Washington, Tennessee, Minnesota, Oklahoma, Alabama, California, Oregon, Nevada, West Virginia, Virginia, Pennsylvania, Maryland and Utah.
LGI Insurance Solutions provides homeowners insurance and other insurance products to our customers through an unconsolidated joint venture.
